finding: An active target task can continue while its 3KLife planning source card is changed because the imported task/direction lock does not durably enforce source-card identity and hash across repositories.
expectedBehavior: Import and claim must retain planning source identity/hash; target write/close must detect planning-source drift and fail closed unless a governed amendment or mirror authority exists.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-AAO-0157 planning card was mutable after target claim; the target direction lock had empty persisted planningReadOnlyPaths even though prompt routing could derive the source path.
followUp: Add cross-repo source hash/lock persistence, planning-repo enforcement, and drift regressions.
